creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
I still had this problem on 8.3/i386.

Compilation worked after I commented everything in /etc/make.conf.
In this file I had:
> SUPFLAGS=-g -L 2
> SUPFILE=/usr/local/netfence/etc/supfile
> DOCSUPFILE=/usr/local/netfence/etc/doc-supfile
> DOC_LANG=en_US.ISO8859-1 it_IT.ISO8859-15
> WITH_JADETEX=yes
> SUP_UPDATE=true
> WITH_RAZOR=yes
> APACHE_PORT=www/apache22
> RUBY_DEFAULT_VER=1.8
> PERL_VERSION=5.12.4

Don't know which line was the culprit.
HTH.

  bye
	av.
